items.name: magnetic-button
items.description: A button that uses Framer Motion spring physics to magnetically pull toward the cursor on hover with a glowing spotlight border effect.

items.name: floating-panel
items.description: A headless, composable floating panel with glassmorphic styling, spring animations, position-aware anchoring, and built-in form support.

items.name: three-hover-card
items.description: A premium card component that reveals a live Three.js 3D scene with a rotating icosahedron on hover. The canvas is lazy-loaded for performance.

items.name: interactive-globe
items.description: A 3D interactive globe component powered by Three.js and three-globe with customizable arcs, points, and atmosphere rendering.

items.name: cosmic-eye
items.description: A WebGL shader-based animated eye effect with cosmic nebula colors, mouse-tracking pupil, and organic noise textures.

items.name: expandable-card
items.description: An expandable card component with smooth Framer Motion animations that reveals additional content on interaction.

items.name: reflective-card
items.description: A card component with a reflective surface effect powered by Framer Motion animations that responds to cursor movement.

items.name: shimmer-button
items.description: A button with a continuous diagonal shimmer sweep effect, configurable color, and spring-physics hover interactions.

items.name: text-reveal
items.description: Text animation that reveals characters or words with staggered blur-in effect on scroll into view.

items.name: number-ticker
items.description: Animated number counter with spring physics that ticks up to a target value when scrolled into view.

items.name: dock-menu
items.description: A macOS-style dock with smooth magnification effect powered by Framer Motion spring physics and motion values.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.description: A glassmorphic card with a cursor-following spotlight radial gradient, border glow, and hover effects.

items.name: drawer
items.description: An animated bottom sheet / side drawer with spring physics, backdrop blur overlay, ESC-to-close, click-outside dismiss, and body scroll lock.

items.name: toast
items.description: A context-based toast notification system with spring-physics animations, auto-dismiss, four color-coded types, and stacked positioning.

items.name: animated-tabs
items.description: A tab component with a sliding animated indicator and smooth fade+slide content transitions. Three variants with spring physics.

items.name: marquee
items.description: A reusable infinite horizontal scrolling component with pure CSS animation, configurable speed, direction, and hover-to-pause.

items.name: flip-words
items.description: Words that flip and rotate in and out with 3D perspective animation and spring physics.

items.name: wavy-text
items.description: Text where each character animates in with a staggered wave pattern using spring physics on viewport entry.

items.name: typewriter-text
items.description: A typewriter effect that types text character by character with a blinking cursor, cycling through an array of words.

items.name: gradient-text
items.description: Animated gradient text with flowing color stops that shift across the text using a CSS keyframe animation.

items.name: text-scramble
items.description: Text that scrambles through random characters before resolving left-to-right with configurable speed and character set.

items.name: blur-text
items.description: Text that fades in from a blurred state, word by word or all at once, with configurable blur amount and stagger.

items.name: split-text
items.description: Text animation that splits into characters or words with staggered slide, fade, or scale transitions on scroll.

items.name: rotating-text
items.description: Text that rotates through multiple strings with a rolling slot-machine effect using spring-physics transitions.

items.name: grid-pattern
items.description: A subtle CSS grid background pattern with configurable cell size, line color, opacity, and an optional radial fade mask.

items.name: dot-pattern
items.description: A dot matrix background pattern with configurable spacing, dot size, color, and an optional radial fade mask.

items.name: beams-background
items.description: Animated light beams that sweep across the background with staggered delays and randomized angles. Pure CSS keyframes.

items.name: stars-background
items.description: A twinkling star field background with randomly scattered stars that pulse in and out at varying speeds. Pure CSS keyframes.

items.name: mesh-gradient
items.description: An animated mesh gradient background with multiple color blobs that blend together using heavy CSS blur.

items.name: wavy-background
items.description: SVG-based animated wavy lines that drift horizontally in the background with decreasing opacity for depth.

items.name: aurora-background
items.description: A CSS-only animated aurora borealis background effect with soft blurred gradient bands that drift and rotate.

items.name: particle-field
items.description: Floating particle dots that drift slowly across the background with CSS keyframe animations and randomized timing.

items.name: scroll-progress
items.description: A fixed progress bar that animates from 0% to 100% based on page scroll using useScroll and useSpring for smooth spring-physics animation.

items.name: fade-on-scroll
items.description: A wrapper component that fades and slides children into view when scrolled into the viewport with configurable direction, distance, and spring physics.

items.name: scroll-counter
items.description: An animated counter that counts from one number to another when scrolled into view using spring physics and direct DOM updates for performance.

items.name: glow-button
items.description: A button with a pulsing glow shadow that intensifies on hover, using CSS keyframes and Framer Motion spring interactions.

items.name: ripple-button
items.description: A Material-design-style ripple effect button with expanding circles at the click position. Pure CSS animation, no Framer Motion.

items.name: gradient-border-button
items.description: A button with a continuously rotating conic-gradient border and solid dark inner background. Framer Motion hover/tap.

items.name: confetti-button
items.description: A button that bursts colorful confetti particles on click with random directions, colors, and rotations. Framer Motion hover/tap.

items.name: follow-cursor
items.description: A decorative glowing dot that smoothly follows the cursor using Framer Motion spring physics with configurable stiffness and damping.

items.name: blob-cursor
items.description: A morphing blob shape that follows the cursor with heavy spring inertia, CSS blur, and mix-blend-mode for an organic liquid feel.

items.name: spotlight-cursor
items.description: A full-viewport radial gradient spotlight that follows the cursor, illuminating content beneath with useMotionTemplate for reactive CSS gradients.

items.name: otp-input
items.description: An animated OTP/verification code input with auto-focus navigation, paste support, spring-physics glow on active input, and glass-morphic styling.

items.name: morphing-dialog
items.description: A dialog that morphs from its trigger element using shared layout animation with spring physics, backdrop blur, and glassmorphic styling.

items.name: morphing-card
items.description: A card that smoothly morphs between collapsed and expanded states using layout animation with spring physics and content crossfade.

items.name: floating-navbar
items.description: A scroll-aware navbar that shrinks into a floating glassmorphic pill on scroll.

items.name: animated-input
items.description: Text input with animated floating label and expanding underline on focus.

items.name: parallax-scroll
items.description: Wrapper that adds parallax scrolling to any content with configurable speed and direction.

items.name: sticky-scroll-reveal
items.description: Two-column layout with scrolling text sections and a sticky content panel.

items.name: cta-block
items.description: A call-to-action section with animated gradient borders, radial glow background, and staggered entrance animation.

items.name: search-spotlight
items.description: A macOS Spotlight / Raycast-style search dialog with keyboard navigation, category grouping, and spring animations.

items.name: holographic-card
items.description: A card with a real-time rainbow holographic foil effect that shifts with viewing angle, like a Pokemon holographic card.

items.name: handwritten-annotation
items.description: SVG annotations (circles, underlines, highlights, arrows, brackets, strikethroughs) that animate as if being drawn by hand in real-time.

items.name: moving-border
items.description: An animated gradient light that travels along the border of an element using CSS keyframe rotation of a conic-gradient.

items.name: shader-blob
items.description: A real-time GLSL metaball/blob that morphs organically using FBM noise, reacts to cursor, and emits a soft emissive glow with two-tone color gradients.

items.name: liquid-button
items.description: A button whose surface ripples like liquid mercury when hovered and clicked, with organic spring-physics ripple waves from cursor position.

items.name: morphing-blob
items.description: An SVG blob that continuously morphs between organic shapes using requestAnimationFrame interpolation with configurable gradient fill, speed, and size.

items.name: chromatic-text
items.description: Text with chromatic aberration -- RGB channels split on hover or always active with configurable offset and colors.

items.name: disintegration-effect
items.description: Thanos-snap particle dissolve effect wrapper.

items.name: liquid-button
items.description: Button with liquid mercury ripple effect on click.

items.name: morphing-blob
items.description: SVG blob that continuously morphs between organic shapes.

items.name: neural-network
items.description: Canvas-based animated network graph with firing synapses.

items.name: gravity-grid
items.description: Grid of dots that attract or repel from cursor.

items.name: typewriter-terminal
items.description: Realistic terminal emulator with typing animation.

items.name: browser-frame
items.description: Browser window mockup for showcasing content.

items.name: phone-frame
items.description: Mobile phone device mockup frame.

items.name: animated-beam
items.description: Light beam that travels along SVG paths for integration diagrams.

items.name: data-orbit
items.description: Icons orbiting in concentric rings around a center element.

items.name: audio-reactive-wave
items.description: A waveform visualizer with gradient-colored bars that react to audio input or generate animated demo sine waves with glow effects.

items.name: portal-transition
items.description: A circular portal/wormhole transition effect that reveals content with expanding clip-path, glow ring, and particle effects.

items.name: split-screen-reveal
items.description: Two glassmorphic panels that split apart on click to reveal content underneath with spring-physics animation.

items.name: smoke-divider
items.description: A section divider with animated smoke/fog particles drifting across. Pure CSS animation with hydration-safe seeded randomization.

items.name: glitch-transition
items.description: A CRT TV glitch effect with RGB split, scanlines, block displacement, and flicker that wraps any content.

items.name: ambient-tilt
items.description: A wrapper that adds subtle 3D tilt based on cursor position or device gyroscope with spring-animated transforms.

items.name: icon-cloud
items.description: A 3D tag cloud of floating icons that rotate as a sphere with drag interaction and depth-based scaling.

items.name: retro-grid
items.description: A perspective grid that vanishes to a horizon point with a retro synthwave aesthetic and optional scroll animation.

items.name: evolution-hero
items.description: Cinematic hero section with AI-generated evolution scene background, mouse parallax, holographic code overlays, and scanning effects.

items.name: kpi-card
items.description: Dashboard KPI card with animated number counter, change indicator, and optional sparkline.

items.name: sparkline-chart
items.description: Pure SVG sparkline with smooth bezier curves and optional animated drawing.

items.name: progress-ring
items.description: SVG progress ring with animated stroke and configurable gradient.

items.name: splash-cursor
items.description: A fluid ink splash effect that follows the cursor with colorful blobs, blur trails, and velocity-based motion using Canvas 2D.

items.name: flickering-grid
items.description: A canvas-rendered grid of cells that randomly flicker on and off with smooth opacity transitions and a radial fade mask.

items.name: border-beam
items.description: A continuous animated light beam that travels around the border of an element using CSS conic-gradient rotation with a glow trail.

items.name: neon-glow-card
items.description: A card with animated neon border glow that pulses and reacts to cursor position with multiple box-shadow layers and spring-scale hover.

items.name: infinite-canvas
items.description: A pannable, zoomable canvas where child elements float in 2D space with grid background, mouse wheel zoom, and touch pinch support.

items.name: cinematic-hero
items.description: A full-screen cinematic hero section with multiple background variants, staggered word blur-reveal headline, animated CTAs, and badge.

items.name: accordion
items.description: Collapsible sections with animated open/close using Framer Motion AnimatePresence for height animation.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: Animated tooltip on hover with configurable side positioning and spring-physics enter/exit transitions.

items.name: popover
items.description: Click-triggered popover panel with portal rendering, click-outside-to-close, and spring animation.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.description: Animated dropdown menu with spring animation, keyboard navigation, and click-outside dismiss.

items.name: avatar
items.description: User avatar with image support and gradient-colored fallback initials derived from the user name.

items.name: badge
items.description: Status badge/tag with five color variants (default, success, warning, error, info) and optional pulse dot.

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder with animated shimmer pulse, configurable dimensions, and optional rounded shape.

items.name: switch
items.description: Toggle switch with spring-animated thumb, three sizes, and proper ARIA switch role.

items.name: slider
items.description: Range slider with track fill, draggable thumb, configurable min/max/step, and custom color.

items.name: progress-bar
items.description: Horizontal progress bar with configurable color, optional animation pulse, and percentage label.

items.name: divider
items.description: Styled divider line supporting horizontal/vertical orientation, optional label, and gradient fade.

items.name: kbd
items.description: Keyboard shortcut display styled like a physical key with inset shadow and monospace font.

items.name: code-inline
items.description: Inline code snippet with monospace styling, subtle background, and border.

items.name: avatar-group
items.description: Stacked overlapping avatars with configurable max count and overflow indicator.

items.name: timeline
items.description: Vertical timeline with scroll-triggered fade-in animation, dot/icon markers, and date support.

items.name: color-picker
items.description: Simple color picker with preset swatches and hex input.

items.name: calendar
items.description: Mini calendar component with clickable days, month navigation, and dark theme styling.

items.name: stat-card
items.description: Dashboard stat card with label, value, change indicator, and animated number on mount.

items.name: command-menu
items.description: Cmd+K command palette with keyboard navigation, search filtering, and spring animations.

items.name: file-tree
items.description: Animated expandable file tree with folder/file icons, indentation, and spring-animated expand/collapse.

items.name: stepper
items.description: Step progress indicator with connected animated lines, active step scaling, and descriptions.

items.name: rating
items.description: Star rating component with hover preview, configurable max and size, and spring-physics interactions.

items.name: tag-input
items.description: Input for adding and removing tags with animated enter/exit, backspace-to-delete, and glassmorphic styling.

items.name: countdown
items.description: Animated countdown timer showing days, hours, minutes, and seconds with spring-animated digit transitions.

items.name: copy-block
items.description: Code block with copy-to-clipboard button, filename header, and animated copy confirmation.

items.name: image-compare
items.description: Before/after image comparison slider with draggable handle and clip-path reveal.

items.name: pricing-toggle
items.description: Monthly/yearly pricing toggle with spring-animated pill switch and savings badge.

items.name: notification-badge
items.description: Numbered notification badge with spring-animated enter/exit, max count overflow, and configurable color.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Breadcrumb navigation with customizable separator, link support, and active-last-item styling.

items.name: empty-state
items.description: Empty state placeholder with icon, title, description, and optional CTA button with spring entrance animation.

items.name: wobble-card
items.description: Card that wobbles with spring physics on hover using mouse-tracked rotateX/Y transforms.

items.name: direction-hover
items.description: Content overlay that slides in from the direction the cursor enters the element.

items.name: tilt-card
items.description: Simplified 3D tilt card using useMotionValue and useTransform with configurable max tilt and perspective.

items.name: blur-fade
items.description: Wrapper that blurs and fades content in on scroll using useInView with configurable delay and duration.

items.name: pulse-button
items.description: Button with radiating pulse rings using CSS keyframe animations with configurable color and count.

items.name: spotlight-border
items.description: Border wrapper with a cursor-following spotlight glow effect using spring-animated motion values.

items.name: typewriter-delete
items.description: Text that types then deletes with a blinking cursor, configurable speed and loop.

items.name: counter-up
items.description: Animated counting number using requestAnimationFrame with eased progress on scroll into view.

items.name: magnetic-card
items.description: Card that slightly follows cursor with magnetic pull effect using spring-animated motion values.

items.name: glow-text
items.description: Text with animated glow/bloom effect using CSS text-shadow keyframe animation.

items.name: reveal-card
items.description: Card that reveals content on hover with a slide-up transition using Framer Motion variants.

items.name: orbit-animation
items.description: Orbiting dots around a center element with CSS rotation animation and configurable count and speed.

items.name: text-gradient-scroll
items.description: Text that fills with gradient color as the user scrolls using useScroll and clip-path transforms.

items.name: animated-counter
items.description: Counting animation with slot-machine digit flip where each digit slides independently.

items.name: hover-card
items.description: Card with subtle lift and shadow increase on hover using spring scale and shadow transition.
